message.content:
I’m happy to help, but I’m missing the problem statement. Please provide the full problem text (or a link) including:

- Input format and constraints
- Output format
- Sample input/output (even just one or two examples)
- Any special notes or edge cases

If you can’t share the exact statement, you can describe:
- What you’re given (e.g., numbers, graph, grid, strings)
- What you need to compute or optimize
- The constraints (e.g., n up to 2e5, time limit)
- The language you want the solution in (Python, C++, etc.)

Once I have that, I’ll deliver:
- A clear approach and reasoning
- An algorithm with proof of correctness or justification
- Complexity analysis (time and memory)
- Clean, tested code (in your preferred language)
- Explanation of edge cases and sample tests

If you want, you can paste a snippet or the exact input/output example you’re aiming to handle, and I’ll tailor the solution right away.
